title: Lunch Break
content: At noon, Rachel finally took her lunch break. She left the office with two coworkers and walked to a small sandwich shop nearby. The streets were busy with people enjoying the warm weather. Rachel ordered a chicken sandwich and a bottle of water. Her coworkers talked about a new television series, but Rachel mostly listened quietly. She liked peaceful moments during busy workdays. After lunch, they slowly walked back to the office. Rachel checked the time and realized she still had many emails to answer before going home.
